_publications._publicationTitle: Primary osteopathy of vertebrae in a neurofibromatosis type 1 murine model.

_contextSnippet: a significant reduction in BMD was observed in the L1–L5 region of Nf1 mice (flox/−;Col2.3Cre+ Figs. 2C–D, *p<0.05)
details: Significant reduction in BMD in L1-L5 vertebral region compared to other genotypes (p<0.05)
